title: doronicum piloselloides
intro: Doronicum piloselloides, also known as golden hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that grows in the mountainous regions of Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Doronicum piloselloides include reducing inflammation and pain, and it has also been used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
